body.title: [dependency] Consolidate ALL local plaintext secrets into one chmod-600 home; rotate exposed keys
body.intention: I intend that there is exactly ONE plaintext-secret file on disk (~/.unseen_university/uu_bash_profile.sh, chmod 600) — making that file's own 'the ONLY plaintext secret on disk' comment true again — with every other scattered plaintext key removed and any exposed key rotated.
body.description:
Two live plaintext secrets currently sit OUTSIDE the intended single home: (1) OPENROUTER_API_KEY exported at ~/.bashrc:144; (2) GOOGLE_AI_STUDIO_API_KEY in ~/.unseen_university/.env. uu_bash_profile.sh comments 'the ONLY plaintext secret on disk' — currently FALSE. Consolidate to the one home (or the credential manager per [[reference_compose_credentials_at_connect_time]] / [[reference_credentials]]) and remove the scattered copies.

**⚠ AKIEN ACTION FIRST (blocks this ticket):** the OpenRouter key at ~/.bashrc:144 is exposed in plaintext and is the one account with a balance — Akien to ROTATE it (and decide whether the Google key is still needed / rotate) BEFORE CC relocates references. CC cannot rotate provider keys.

**Then CC:** move the (rotated) OR key and any live Google key into uu_bash_profile.sh (or creds file), delete the plaintext exports from .bashrc:144 and .env. Verify nothing in the code reads them from the old locations (grep OPENROUTER_API_KEY / GOOGLE_AI_STUDIO_API_KEY across the repo + processor).

**Affected files:** ~/.bashrc (line 144, personal — NOT repo; back it up first), ~/.unseen_university/.env, ~/.unseen_university/uu_bash_profile.sh (chmod 600), possibly ~/.unseen_university/akien/akien.credentials.cfg.
**Design rules:** no-live-keys-in-source (these are outside the repo but the principle drives single-homing + connect-time composition); compose-credentials-at-connect-time.
**Scope boundary:** IN — relocate the two exposed keys into the single secret home, remove plaintext copies, confirm no code reads the old locations. OUT — the .bashrc export migration of NON-secret vars (T-bashrc-uu-migration-finish), removing the now-empty debris files (T-remove-env-creds-debris).
**Test plan:** no automated tests (touches personal dotfiles/secrets, not repo code). Acceptance: `grep -rE "sk-or-|GOOGLE_AI_STUDIO_API_KEY=" ~/.bashrc ~/.unseen_university/.env` returns nothing; the keys resolve at connect-time from the single home; a launched session/inference still authenticates.
**Completion criteria:** exactly one plaintext-secret file remains; the exposed OR key is rotated (Akien) and single-homed; no code reads a key from .bashrc or .env.
**Rollback:** the .bashrc/.env backups restore the prior state (manual — these are outside git).

[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)

[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
